clues.clue_text: Version of a textbook designed for instruction
Product with Pro, Air and Mini varieties
Use salt instead of sugar while baking, say
___ Winter, basketball coach who famously innovated the "triangle offense"
Like some simple repair jobs, in brief
"Things are only going to get worse" ... or a hint to answering the seven italicized clues in this puzzle
Chemical element whose use led to the first known law against poisoning
Photo-editing technique used to create a smooth transition
Made younger-looking in an editing studio, say
Reality TV franchise created by Tyra Banks
Philosophy symbolized by yin and yang
Company behind the machine used to make Slurpees
Kind of paper in a lab
Org. to which you might provide your bank account info
M.L.B. team that once went by OAK on scoreboards
Singer whose "Hello" was the fastest video ever to reach 1 billion views on YouTube
N.Y.C. neighborhood that's home to the Grey Art Museum
Video game character aptly celebrated on Mar. 10
Horn contents at a Viking feast
